meta.label: Board Game
meta.name: Black Stories
meta.short_description: Think outside the box to resolve dark and morbid riddles.

alternatenames.name: ブラックストーリーズ：50の“黒い”物語

meta.description: 50 black stories, 31 crimes, 49 corpses, 11 murders, 12 suicides and one deadly meal. How could that have happened? Black Stories are fiddly, morbid and mysterious riddles for teenagers and adults. The players try to reconstruct the crime by asking, guessing and fiddling about. A spooky card game just right for any party.
